title: Acoustic Violin Bare-Bones Starter Packet
artifact_focus: bowed string / violin-family L2 starter packet

fabrication_authority.current_status: blocked until reviewed drawings, CAD/DXF, measured setup data, and validation evidence exist

required_before_public: Select and cite an arching and graduation reference before cutting plates.
Create reviewed CAD/DXF or dimensioned drawings for outline, neck set, bridge line, and f-hole placeholders.
Verify the selected string set against published tension data before first pitch-up.
Record bridge fit, soundpost fit, action, neck projection, and open-string pitch stability before L3 readiness.
Replace estimated sourcing fields with date-checked supplier evidence before purchasing claims.

notes: This manifest is repo-relative and intentionally keeps the packet at L2 scaffold readiness.
Existing deck and print-packet artifacts are documentation outputs, not fabrication authority.
Use measured setup data, reviewed drawings, and CAD/DXF evidence before promoting beyond starter status.
